title: Kuro’s Ambition Collapses
description: On pages 5–8, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You should've just quietly let me chop you to pieces..!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Look! It's all because of you,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: My beloved crew, is half dead and in great pain!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Ever be a pirate like you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Of course, you can't even be a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Try and use your "silient step" now

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'll write the Will!! Just stop hurting the boys!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No!! After you write the will,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't try to negotiate with me!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
